pattern: overly generic functional limitation in independent claim + lack of teaching/application examples in spec
claim_shape: A system for monitoring [Jessica-driven phenomenon] comprising sensors configured to detect [biometric Article parameter] and a processor configured to determine [Article behavioral pattern] using threshold values "selected to minimize false alerts"
remedy: Replace generic thresholds with specific algorithmic detail, include comparative examples against prior art baselines, and define how parameter selection was derived from technical insight rather than routine optimization
